author: Yue Zenglei
description: Monthly worklog tracker with tasks, time entries, calendar, and local JSON storage. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Yue Zenglei
manifest.description: Monthly worklog tracker with tasks, time entries, calendar, and local JSON storage.
manifest.name: Worklog

name: Worklog

releases.author: 352662115-hub
releases.description:
## Changes

- Improved daily worklog detail filtering and layout.
- Unified tooltip positioning across task, chart, and work content tooltips.
- Added schema version normalization and migration handling.
- Added Jest coverage for core data normalization, statistics, date validation, and report generation.
- Relaxed task issue validation so task creation and editing no longer require an issue.

releases.author: 352662115-hub
releases.description:
### 变更
- 任务清单增加编辑按钮
- 完成率和任务统计规则修改
- 取消月度笔记
- 增加年度 月度总结
releases.name: 工作日志 0.1.4 版本发布

releases.author: 352662115-hub
releases.description:
Worklog 0.1.3 release.

Changes:
- Rename daily worklog content labels from 做了什么 to 工作内容.
- Keep recent task-hours tooltip, daily issue display, and task ID visibility fixes included in main.

Assets:
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css

releases.author: 352662115-hub
releases.description:
Initial community plugin release.

Includes:
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css

releases.author: 352662115-hub
releases.description:
Release for Worklog Obsidian Plugin 0.1.2.

Changes:
- Polish the monthly dashboard layout for safer centered content and fixed-height scrollable tables.
- Add cleaner task/time entry row actions, including edit support for daily time records.
- Use plan-hour based task type percentages in the yearly dashboard.
- Add command-driven create/jump workflows for monthly and yearly worklog dashboards.
- Store monthly data under yearly directories and document the current data layout.
releases.name: Worklog v0.1.2

releases.author: 352662115-hub
releases.description:
Release for Worklog Obsidian Plugin 0.1.1.

Changes:
- Remove unused templateFolder setting from defaults and example config.
- Use adapter-based JSON reads and writes for hidden plugin data directories.
- Refresh open worklog and yearly dashboard views after plugin saves data.
- Add safer handling for invalid monthly JSON data.
- Update README and manifest for this release.
releases.name: Worklog v0.1.1
